items.title: BTCMap
items.description: Open-source project mapping Bitcoin-accepting merchants and locations worldwide. Community-driven data using OpenStreetMap as the base layer.

items.title: Casa
items.description: Fee-based collaborative custody service providing managed multisig vaults and personal security consulting.

items.title: Circular Economy
items.description: Examination of earning, spending, and saving entirely in Bitcoin without converting to fiat, including merchant directories, gift cards, and peer-to-peer commerce tools.

items.title: IBEXPay
items.description: Merchant payment processor for accepting Bitcoin via Lightning and on-chain. Targets businesses from single-location shops to multi-location chains.

items.title: OpenNode
items.description: Bitcoin payment processor for businesses. Settles payments via Lightning and on-chain with an API, e-commerce plugins, and hosted payment pages.

items.title: Strike
items.description: Consumer-friendly Bitcoin and Lightning payment application. Allows users to buy, sell, and send bitcoin with a focus on simplicity and low fees.

items.title: Unchained Capital
items.description: Collaborative custody provider and financial services company focused on bitcoin-native products.
